Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Sometimes {f 0 1 2}Monad doors{f 0 1 27} will appear in the Abyss of Time. Defeating the special enemy in one will trigger a special Shuffle Time, where {f 0 1 2}Major Arcana cards appear more frequently{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 22}From left to right, the three doors increase in both difficulty and value of items rewarded. Consecutive battles will sometimes await you, so be prepared before entering a door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 23}Defeating these enemies will also reveal {f 0 1 2}the layout of the current and next floor{f 0 1 27} upon leaving. Once this is done, the power within the doors will be released, sealing them shut.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The Monad door is an unstable contraption. When one appears on a floor, the door will lose power and become inaccessible if you move to another floor, even if you return to it later.[n]{f 1 1}
